description: Add a text comment to an existing LabArchives entry. DESTRUCTIVE: it writes a comment into the live electronic lab notebook.
rules: DESTRUCTIVE — adds a comment to an entry on the live remote notebook
credentials are read from LA_CONFIG (a config.yaml)
LA_NBID + LA_ENTRY_ID select the target entry; LA_COMMENT is the comment text
needs the labarchives-py package + network; degrades to {} offline
usage: Set LA_CONFIG, LA_NBID, LA_ENTRY_ID, LA_COMMENT. Output: create_comment.json audit.
limitation: Requires the labarchives-py package, valid credentials, and network. Mutates the remote ELN, so the executor gates it (destructive). Offline the tool writes {} and exits 0.
